item.title: Iran War Drives US Inflation Spike, Consumer Confidence Slumps — Report
item.description: WASHINGTON — The ongoing conflict in Iran has triggered a sharp surge in inflation in the United States, driven largely by a dramatic rise in fuel prices, according to a report by the Associated Press. Data released by the U.S. Department of Labor shows consumer prices rose 3.3% in March compared to a year earlier, […]The post Iran War Drives US Inflation Spike, Consumer Confidence Slumps — Report appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Unifreight Africa Targets Tobacco Haulage Expansion
item.description: HARARE – Unifreight Africa says it will ramp up fleet capacity and operational efficiency in 2026 as it targets transporting more than 100 million kilogrammes of tobacco, up from 84 million kilogrammes handled in 2025. The logistics firm, a key player in Zimbabwe’s tobacco value chain, indicated that the planned growth will be supported by […]The post Unifreight Africa Targets Tobacco Haulage Expansion appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: DR Congo central bank to ban US dollar use
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo’s central bank said Thursday that it would ban the use of dollars and other foreign currencies for cash transactions in the country. Foreign currencies have gradually overtaken the use of the weak local Congo franc in recent years in stores and other places. The Congo Central Bank has tried and […]The post DR Congo central bank to ban US dollar use appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Residents Fear Diddy’s Return as Appeal Raises Release Prospects
item.description: LOS ANGELES — Residents of the exclusive Holmby Hills neighbourhood are reportedly expressing concern over the possible return of music mogul Sean Combs, amid uncertainty surrounding his ongoing legal appeal. According to TMZ, neighbours in the affluent Los Angeles enclave are increasingly anxious that Combs could soon be released if an appeals court rules in […]The post Residents Fear Diddy’s Return as Appeal Raises Release Prospects appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Usher and Chris Brown Announce “Raymond & Brown” Stadium Tour
item.description: LOS ANGELES — R&B superstars Usher and Chris Brown have announced a joint stadium tour titled Raymond & Brown, in a move set to bring together two of the genre’s most influential artists. According to AllHipHop, the tour was unveiled on April 10, 2026, through coordinated social media posts by both artists, accompanied by a […]The post Usher and Chris Brown Announce “Raymond & Brown” Stadium Tour appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Offset Discharged After Florida Casino Shooting as Legal and Financial Troubles Mount
item.description: HOLLYWOOD, Florida — Rapper Offset has been discharged from hospital after sustaining gunshot wounds during a violent altercation outside a casino, as legal and financial concerns continue to mount around the artist. According to a report by AllHipHop, the former Migos member walked out of Memorial Regional Hospital in Hollywood, Florida, on Thursday after receiving […]The post Offset Discharged After Florida Casino Shooting as Legal and Financial Troubles Mount appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Floyd Mayweather Hit With $7.3 Million IRS Lien Amid Mounting Legal and Financial Pressures
item.description: LAS VEGAS — Boxing legend Floyd Mayweather Jr. is facing mounting financial pressure after the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) filed a new tax lien of approximately $7.3 million, adding to a series of legal and financial challenges confronting the former world champion. According to a report by AllHipHop, the lien was filed last month in […]The post Floyd Mayweather Hit With $7.3 Million IRS Lien Amid Mounting Legal and Financial Pressures appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Reimagining Zimbabwe’s Digital Future: Delivering End-to-End, Tech-Enabled Transformation in a Constrained but Opportunity-Rich Economy
item.description: Zimbabwe stands at a pivotal inflexion point in its digital evolution. While macroeconomic volatility, currency instability, and infrastructure constraints continue to shape the operating environment, the convergence of cloud computing, data-driven decision-making, artificial intelligence, and platform-based business models presents a generational opportunity to leapfrog legacy inefficiencies. By Brighton Musonza Delivering end-to-end, tech-enabled transformation in this […]The post Reimagining Zimbabwe’s Digital Future: Delivering End-to-End, Tech-Enabled Transformation in a...

channel.item: Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus’ April Fool’s prank shocks fans https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-01-springboks-coach-rassie-erasmus-april-fools-prank-shocks-fan.html Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus stunned fans with an April Fool’s prank that sparked reactions, debate, and laughter across social media. The post Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus’ April Fool’s prank shocks fans appeared first on iHarare News . Sun, 12 Apr 2026 02:05:56 +0000 https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-01-springboks-coach-rassie-erasmus-april-fools-prank-shocks-fan.html Sport Iharare News <media:content url="summary: "Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus stunned fans with an April Fool’s prank that sparked reactions, debate, and laughter across social media. The post Springboks coach Rassie Erasmus’ April Fool’s prank shocks fans appeared first on iHarare News ." medium="image"/>

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: ICC reveals Zimbabwe’s prize money from the T20 World Cup 2026
item.description: FINAL $11.25M PLAYERS’ PRIZE MONEY DISTRIBUTION FOR ICC MEN’S T20 WORLD CUP 2026The post ICC reveals Zimbabwe’s prize money from the T20 World Cup 2026 first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat
